nasb.text: If Satan has risen up against himself and is divided, he cannot stand, but he is finished!

esv.text: And if Satan has risen up against himself and is divided, he cannot stand, but is coming to an end.

cnv.text: 如果撒但自相攻打紛爭，不但站立不住，而且還要滅亡。

ccb.text: 同样，撒旦如果与自己为敌，自相纷争，就站立不住，必然灭亡。

csbs.text: 撒旦如果起来反对自己而纷争，他不但站立不住，而且要完了。
